name: Frozen Pink Lemonade Sundae Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 graham cracker crust or 9-inch pie shell
1 can sweetened condensed milk (not evaporated milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk and whisk until smooth.
3. Stir in the bottled lemon juice and food coloring.
4. Gently fold in the whipped cream.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
6. Freeze or chill for 6 hours or until firm.
7. Let stand at room temperature for 10 minutes before serving.
8. Garnish as desired.
Freeze leftovers. Makes one 9-inch pie.
